text.value: The HTML fragment 'ip-statements.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
Reference to deprecated ValueSet http://hl7.org/fhir/5.0/ValueSet/jurisdiction|5.0.0
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#DK for language(s) 'da-DK'. The display is 'Denmark' which is the default language display

Constraint failed: cnl-0: 'Name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation (name.exists() implies name.matches('^[A-Z]([A-Za-z0-9_]){1,254}$'))' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ActorDefinition)

The resource ActorDefinition/ProducerActor could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

Wrong Display Name 'genoptræningsenhed' for http://snomed.info/sct#546811000005109. Valid display is one of 4 choices: 'genoptræningscenter' (en), 'rehabiliteringscenter' (en), 'rehabilitation center (environment)' (en) or 'rehabilitation center' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
The concept '546811000005109' has a status of inactive and its use should be reviewed

Wrong Display Name 'handicapenhed' for http://snomed.info/sct#554861000005100. Valid display is one of 6 choices: 'handikap' (en), 'handicap' (en), 'handicap (environment)' (en), 'handicap' (en), 'Handicap (environment)' (en) or 'Handicap' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
The concept '550641000005106' has a status of inactive and its use should be reviewed
The concept '557671000005101' has a status of inactive and its use should be reviewed

Wrong Display Name 'psykiatrienhed' for http://snomed.info/sct#554871000005105. Valid display is one of 5 choices: 'psykiatri' (en), 'psychiatry (environment)' (en), 'psychiatry' (en), 'Psychiatry (environment)' (en) or 'Psychiatry' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'pædagogisk psykologisk rådgivning (PPR)' for http://snomed.info/sct#556841000005105. Valid display is one of 5 choices: 'pædagogisk psykologisk rådgivning' (en), 'PPR' (en), 'Social psychological counseling (environment)' (en), 'Social psychological counseling' (en) or 'Social psychological counselling' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
The concept '550681000005102' has a status of inactive and its use should be reviewed
The concept '554231000005106' has a status of inactive and its use should be reviewed

This SNOMED-CT based include has some concepts with semantic tags (FSN terms) and some without (preferred terms) - check that this is what is intended (examples for FSN: [pædagogisk psykologisk rådgivning (PPR)] and examples for no FSN: [akupunkturklinik, akutmodtageenhed, almen lægepraksis, apotek, apoteksfilial])

'almen medicin' is no longer considered a correct display for code '408443003' (status = inactive). The correct display is one of General medical practice (qualifier value),General medical practice,almen lægepraksis

Wrong Display Name 'børne_ og ungdomspsykiatri' for http://snomed.info/sct#394588006. Valid display is one of 4 choices: 'Child and adolescent psychiatry (qualifier value)' (en), 'Child and adolescent psychiatry' (en), 'børne- og ungdomspsykiatri' (en) or 'børne- og ungdomspsykiatri' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'dermato_venerologi' for http://snomed.info/sct#394582007. Valid display is one of 4 choices: 'Dermatology (qualifier value)' (en), 'Dermatology' (en), 'dermato-venerologi' (en) or 'dermatologi' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
'kirurgi' is no longer considered a correct display for code '394609007' (status = inactive). The correct display is one of General surgery (qualifier value),General surgery,almen kirurgi

Wrong Display Name 'klinisk fysiologi og nuklearmedicin (snomed: klinisk fysiologi)' for http://snomed.info/sct#394601005. Valid display is one of 4 choices: 'Clinical physiology (qualifier value)' (en), 'Clinical physiology' (en), 'klinisk fysiologi og nuklearmedicin' (en) or 'klinisk fysiologi' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'klinisk immunologi' for http://snomed.info/sct#421661004. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'Blood banking and transfusion medicine (specialty) (qualifier value)' (en), 'Blood banking and transfusion medicine (specialty)' (en) or 'blodbanks- og transfusionsmedicin, speciale' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

'medicinsk allergologi' is no longer considered a correct display for code '394805004' (status = inactive). The correct display is one of Clinical immunology/allergy,Clinical immunology and/or allergy,Clinical immunology and/or allergy (qualifier value)

Wrong Display Name 'odontologi (snomed: odontologiske specialer)' for http://snomed.info/sct#394812008. Valid display is one of 5 choices: 'Dental medicine specialties (qualifier value)' (en), 'Dental medicine specialties' (en), 'odontologi' (en), 'dentalmedicinske specialer' (en) or 'odontologiske specialer' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
The concept '394812008' has a status of inactive and its use should be reviewed

Wrong Display Name 'oto_rhino_laryngologi' for http://snomed.info/sct#394604002. Valid display is one of 6 choices: 'Ear, nose and throat surgery (qualifier value)' (en), 'Ear, nose and throat surgery' (en), 'ENT' (en), 'ENT (ear, nose, throat) surgery' (en), 'oto-rhino-laryngologi' (en) or 'øre-, næse- og halskirurgi' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

'patologisk anatomi og cytologi' is no longer considered a correct display for code '394915009' (status = inactive). The correct display is one of General pathology (specialty) (qualifier value),General pathology (specialty),almen patologi, speciale

Wrong Display Name 'tand_, mund_ og kæbekirurgi' for http://snomed.info/sct#394605001. Valid display is one of 4 choices: 'Oral surgery (qualifier value)' (en), 'Oral surgery' (en), 'oralkirurgi' (en) or 'tand-, mund- og kæbekirurgi' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

'thoraxkirurgi' is no longer considered a correct display for code '394603008' (status = inactive). The correct display is one of Cardiothoracic surgery (qualifier value),Cardiothoracic surgery,hjerte-thorax-kirurgi

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-Confidentiality'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '4.0.0', found versions: 3.0.0 (from hl7.terminology.r4#6.3.0), 4.0.0 (from hl7.terminology.r4#7.1.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-Confidentiality' to 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-Confidentiality|4.0.0'
